mapper.select: SELECT C.*, CASE WHEN CL."USER_NO" IS NULL THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END AS "LIKED_BY_ME", U."USER_NO", U."USER_NICKNAME", UIP."FILE_NO" AS "PROFILE_FILE_NO", UIP."FILE_NAME" AS "PROFILE_FILE_NAME", UIP."ORI_NAME" AS "PROFILE_ORI_NAME" FROM "COMMENT" C LEFT JOIN "USER" U ON C."USER_NO" = U."USER_NO" LEFT JOIN "COMMENT_LIKE" CL ON C."COMMENT_NO" = CL."COMMENT_NO" AND CL."USER_NO" = #{currentUserNo} LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT UI."FILE_NO", UI."FILE_NAME", UI."ORI_NAME" FROM "USER_IMG" UI WHERE UI."USER_NO" = U."USER_NO" ORDER BY UI."FILE_NO" DESC LIMIT 1 ) UIP ON TRUE WHERE C."FEED_NO" = #{feedNo} ORDER BY C."COMMENT_NO" ASC

SELECT C.*, CASE WHEN CL."USER_NO" IS NULL THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END AS "LIKED_BY_ME", U."USER_NO", U."USER_NICKNAME", UIP."FILE_NO" AS "PROFILE_FILE_NO", UIP."FILE_NAME" AS "PROFILE_FILE_NAME", UIP."ORI_NAME" AS "PROFILE_ORI_NAME" FROM "COMMENT" C LEFT JOIN "USER" U ON C."USER_NO" = U."USER_NO" LEFT JOIN "COMMENT_LIKE" CL ON C."COMMENT_NO" = CL."COMMENT_NO" AND CL."USER_NO" = #{currentUserNo} LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT UI."FILE_NO", UI."FILE_NAME", UI."ORI_NAME" FROM "USER_IMG" UI WHERE UI."USER_NO" = U."USER_NO" ORDER BY UI."FILE_NO" DESC LIMIT 1 ) UIP ON TRUE WHERE C."COMMENT_NO" = #{commentNo}
